creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 209706
py-paperless-move-to-django22.patch

Hi Michael,

attached is the patch that assigns deskutils/py-paperless from Django 2.1 (which is EoL since 2nd December 2019) to Django 2.2.

The following commands must be issued before the patch can be applied:

> svn move www/py-dj21-django-extensions www/py-dj22-django-extensions
> svn move www/py-dj21-djangoql www/py-dj22-djangoql

Here's a quick overview what the patch does:

- Change the RUN_DEPENDS accordingly to use www/py-django22 and the www/py-dj22-* ports.
- Rename and undeprecate www/py-dj21-django-extensions TO www/py-dj22-django-extensions (needs maintainer approval from ports <AT> caomhin.org)
- Do the same for www/py-dj21-djangoql
- Add related entries to MOVED and update the Makefile in www/ accordingly

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-, 12.0-, 12.1-RELEASE, 13.0-CURRENT@r354694 amd64 + i386) -> OK
- Runtime wasn't tested, yet
